'''vashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:challengingly|challengingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-sh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:challengingly|challengingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || vashate
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || vashatesher
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || vashatesherëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || vashatero
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || vashateshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || vashateshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivashatero
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokivashateshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivashateshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || govashankerom
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govashankeshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govashankeshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || govashankeya
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || vashaterom
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || vashatemu
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || vashateya
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivashaterom
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivashatemu
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokivashateya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || vashashate
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || vashashatesher
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || vashashatesherëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || vashashatero
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || vashashateshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || vashashateshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivashashatero
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokivashashateshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivashashateshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || govashashankerom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govashashankeshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govashashankeshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || govashashankeya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || vashashaterom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || vashashatemu
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || vashashateya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivashashaterom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivashashatemu
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokivashashateya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || væshæte
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || væshætesher
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || væshætesherëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || væshætero
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || væshæteshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || væshæteshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivæshætero
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokivæshæteshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivæshæteshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || govæshænkerom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govæshænkeshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govæshænkeshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || govæshænkeya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || væshæterom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || væshætemu
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || væshæteya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivæshæterom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivæshætemu
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokivæshæteya
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || vafshafte
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || vafshaftesher
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || vafshaftesherëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || vafshaftero
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || vafshafteshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || vafshafteshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivafshaftero
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokivafshafteshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivafshafteshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || govafshafnkerom
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govafshafnkeshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govafshafnkeshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || govafshafnkeya
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || vafshafterom
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || vafshaftemu
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || vafshafteya
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivafshafterom
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivafshaftemu
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokivafshafteya
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
